Как добавить новый опыт в базу знаний?: How to add new experience to the knowledge base?
Перейдите в раздел \"База знаний\" в бок: Go to the "Knowledge Base" section in the side menu, click "Add Developer Experience" and fill in the required fields: name, description, category, and attach the relevant documents.
Как работает AI-ассистент?: How does the AI assistant work?
AI-ассистент анализирует вашу базу знани: The AI assistant analyzes your knowledge base and answers questions using information from added experience and documents. The more quality data in the knowledge base, the more accurate the answers will be.
Как изменить роль пользователя?: How to change a user's role?
Для изменения ролей пользователей обрати: To change user roles, contact the system administrator. Changing access rights requires appropriate permissions in the "Administration" section.
Почему мой опыт находится на рассмотрени: Why is my experience under review?
Весь новый опыт проходит модерацию для п: All new experience goes through moderation to check quality and compliance with company standards. Review usually takes 1-2 business days. You will receive a notification about the result.
Как экспортировать данные из Wiki?: How to export data from Wiki?
В разделе Wiki выберите нужный документ: In the Wiki section, select the desired document or department, then use the export function in the actions menu. Available formats: PDF, Markdown, HTML.

Пожалуйста, ознакомьтесь с информацией н: Please review the information below before continuing.
Обязанность по защите конфиденциальной и:
Obligation to protect confidential information

The employee (or contractor) undertakes to comply with the Company's requirements regarding the protection of confidential information.

Confidential information includes:
any information about clients, partners, employees, financial indicators, source code, algorithms, software architecture, internal APIs, documentation, reports, databases, infrastructure schemes, settings, logins, passwords, tokens, access keys, certificates and other data that makes it possible to identify the Company's infrastructure or internal processes.

It is prohibited to:

- transfer, copy, upload, or use the Company's confidential information in public chats, forums, repositories, online services,

- enter confidential data into third-party AI models and services (including ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, and others) unless approved by the information security service,

- share internal documents, interface screenshots, code fragments, or any other proprietary information outside corporate systems.
